title: agrostis ushae
intro: Agrostis ushae, also known as Usha's bent grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis ushae include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
